misc: Primary organizer of the Hector Trophée event.
biography: Toni stands as an indispensable pillar of the Hector Trophée, not merely as a competitor but as the primary organizer whose vision and dedication have shaped this esteemed event since its inception. Hailing from Hirsala Golf, Toni holds the unique distinction of having participated in every single iteration of the tournament, a testament to his unwavering commitment and passion for the competition. As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, it marks his unprecedented thirteenth appearance, solidifying his legacy as the enduring heart of this annual golf spectacle.

Beyond his organizational prowess, Toni has also carved out a formidable competitive record on the course. His strategic acumen and consistent performance have led his pairs to claim the coveted Hector Trophée on three separate occasions, a remarkable achievement that underscores his capacity for excellence in the team format. Furthermore, Toni has twice distinguished himself as the preeminent individual talent, securing the prestigious Victor Trophy. These five major titles collectively illustrate a rare blend of leadership and competitive spirit, making him one of the most decorated participants in the tournament's history.

As the architect behind the Hector Trophée, Toni's commitment extends far beyond the greens, ensuring the seamless execution of an event that has become a fixture in the golfing calendar. Yet, it is his continued presence as a formidable competitor that truly encapsulates his comprehensive involvement. His return for the thirteenth consecutive year is eagerly anticipated, as he continues to exemplify the very essence of sportsmanship and competitive drive that he has meticulously cultivated within the tournament for over a decade.
